title: Hintful Audio Cues
description: Sound effects to guide players into learning obscure structure mechanics.
body:
# 💡 Hintful Audio Cues

## ❓ Description

This data+resource pack adds a few sound effects to guide players into discovering the proper placements of blocks in certain multi-block structures—namely enchantment libraries and conduit frames.

**Remember to install/activate both the data pack and the resource pack.** (Click on a version title in the [versions list](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hintful-audio-cues/versions) to see the resource pack download link.)

Supports all <cite>Minecraft: Java Edition</cite> versions from `1.20` snapshot `23w18a` through `26.1-snapshot-1`.

See [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hintful-audio-cues) or [GitLab](https://gitlab.com/ZebulanStanphill/hintful-audio-cues/-/releases) for downloads and changelog.

If you like this pack, you may also enjoy [Hintful Advancements](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hintful-advancements).

## 🧩 Mod Compatibility

This pack is designed with mods in mind; tags are used rather than hardcoded block/item/entity lists in most places. The [standardized common tags](https://wiki.fabricmc.net/community:common_tags) are used whenever possible; and for things not covered by those, tags in my own `zeb` namespace are used for anything not specific to this data pack.

Built-in support is provided for the following mods:

- [Colourful Enchanting Tables](https://modrinth.com/mod/colourful-enchanting-tables)
- [More Enchanting Tables (met)](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-enchanting-tables-(met))

If you spot any places where compatibility with another mod or pack could be improved, let me know on [GitLab](https://gitlab.com/ZebulanStanphill/hintful-audio-cues/-/issues).

## 💬 Bugs, Suggestions, and Feedback

Found a bug? Have an idea to improve the pack? Let me know by opening an issue on the [GitLab](https://gitlab.com/ZebulanStanphill/hintful-audio-cues/-/issues).

## 🏅 Credits

Special thanks to everyone listed in the credits of [Hintful Advancements](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hintful-advancements)—the development of which led to this pack being created along the way.

Graphics in the pack icon derived from UI icons in the Bedrock vanilla resource pack. Sounds currently just referenced from the vanilla game files.

And of course, a very special thanks to the Lord God, without whom none of this would have been possible.

## 👨‍⚖️ License

I'm not even sure if the contents of this data pack are copyrightable, but insofar as they are, see [`LICENSE.txt`](https://gitlab.com/ZebulanStanphill/hintful-audio-cues/-/blob/master/LICENSE.txt).
